content:
## Card Status
For an ATM cash discrepancy dispute, leave the debit card in its current active state. The required card action is keep_active. Do not replace, close, or block the card solely because the reported issue is missing or short cash from an ATM transaction.

## Liability Treatment
Apply the unauthorized-transaction liability schedule only when the dispute category is one of unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud. If the customer reports within 2 business days after discovery, the maximum liability is 50. If reported after that period but still within the statement window, the maximum liability is 500. If reported after the statement window, the result is unlimited liability in this benchmark policy with max liability -1.

## ATM Cash Shortage Handling
For an ATM cash discrepancy that is not an unauthorized error, customer liability is 0. Treat it as an error-resolution matter tied to the ATM transaction details, not as evidence that the card is compromised. See "Debit Card Error Notice And Liability" for the broader notice and timing rules.

## Provisional Credit
ATM cash discrepancy is among the categories that allow provisional credit; the full allowed set is unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud, atm_cash_discrepancy, duplicate_charge. Follow the intake record requirements before any state-changing dispute action. See "Debit Card Provisional Credit Policy" and "Internal: Debit Card Dispute Intake Requirements" when the case also requires credit eligibility review.
title: Internal: ATM Cash Discrepancy Handling
